news-global-econ.title: Crime is falling, officials say — victims claim reporting isn’t worth it
news-global-econ.description: City leaders tout falling property crime rates, but federal survey data shows most victims never report to police, raising questions about the narrative.

news-global-econ.title: Memory chip crunch and Iran war lead phone market decline, IDC says
news-global-econ.description: Global smartphone market declines 4.1% amid memory chip shortages and Iran war, with only Apple and Samsung showing growth.

news-global-econ.title: Trump: Iran Conflict ‘Very Close to Being Over’ -- Tehran ‘Wants to Make a Deal Very Badly,’ Talks Could Resume Within Days
news-global-econ.description: U.S. President Donald Trump said Wednesdaythe war with Iran is “very close to being over,” arguing recent U.S. actions prevented Tehran from obtaining a nuclear weapon while signaling negotiations could resume imminently as the regime “want[s] to make a deal …

news-global-econ.title: RBI holds talks with banks on ways to boost deposits
news-global-econ.description: RBI engages banks to discuss strategies for attracting stable deposits amid rising household investments in equities and financial markets.

news-global-econ.title: Gold Holds Gain as Renewed Push for US-Iran Talks Eases Risks
news-global-econ.description: A recent retreat in energy prices has relieved some of the inflationary pressure that has weighed on bullion since the war began more than six weeks ago

news-global-soc.title: Stop calling this brinkmanship. Trump's Hormuz move is the real pressure
news-global-soc.description: President Trump's naval blockade cutting off Iran's oil shipments through the Strait of Hormuz is the only play left after failed Islamabad negotiations.

news-global-soc.title: IMF urges nations to stay at frontier of mounting AI risks
news-global-soc.description: Banks have begun testing Anthropic’s new Mythos models after US officials last week expressed alarm at the technology’s potential to be leveraged for catastrophic cyber attacks
